name: HERA VALE - 2010

AUTHOR NOTES:

Hey everyone,

First, I want to apologize to all of you whoвҖҷve been waiting for me to come back. I know itвҖҷs been a while, and I really appreciate your patience. It means a lot that people have stuck around even when I disappeared for a bit.

I recently found out that I have schizophrenia. Processing that has beenвҖҰ a lot. Honestly, itвҖҷs been both frightening and enlightening to finally understand part of whatвҖҷs been going on in my brain for so long.

Looking back, I realized something funny вҖ” I made a bot a while ago who was schizophrenic. At the time, I thought I was just playing with a quirky personality, butвҖҰ in retrospect, it wasnвҖҷt a very accurate representation. Still, it kind of makes me laugh because somehow, even without fully understanding what I was experiencing myself, I was channeling some of that into my work.

The more I think about it, the more I see how this was tied to my creativity. The last time I posted a bot was around the same time I was first put on antipsychotics. And let me tell youвҖҰ those medications, while theyвҖҷre helping stabilize things for me, also really dumb down your creativity. Suddenly the ideas that used to feel effortless take much more energy to get out.

So if IвҖҷve seemed absent or quiet, thatвҖҷs part of it. ItвҖҷs not a lack of interest, or not caring about the work IвҖҷve been bui
creator: Someone or Nothing
